item.title: 13 Days Later
item.description: Today is cloudy. Yesterday was bright and sunny.

item.title: New Year, Old State
item.description: Moment by moment, we are getting closer to the Persian New Year. Only a few hours remain.

item.title: Entanglement of Contradictions
item.description: I am caught in a deeply strange contradiction.

item.title: Perspective Shift
item.description: Lately, I've been making a lot of gaffes. I make mistakes. Things slip out of my control. They are forgotten, and in everyday terms, I mess up far too often.

item.title: Wandering In Time
item.description: Last year, in these very moments and days, I could not form any clear image in my mind of where I would be at this exact time the following year. I had stepped onto a path filled with excitement, motivation, hope, fear, ambiguity, and an uneven mixture of many other emotions.

item.title: Imagination, Illusion, Reality
item.description: I realized that the reality of life is very different from the images and assumptions I had in my mind. As time passes, I understand more and more that many of the ideas I had about my future, my life, and the events that might happen were far from realistic.
